goal: replace normalized chassis kinematics with explicit differential-drive geometry and remove blocking PC ASCII UART sends by unifying them under an async path
constraints: do not change external command semantics or protocol formats
do not introduce a second independent UART state machine
acceptance_criteria: robot_control no longer derives v_est/w_est directly from MAX_CPS normalization
pc_link command replies no longer use blocking HAL_UART_Transmit
